# Referrals

### How Referral Points Work
You earn points for referring new users to URnetwork. These points contribute toward your share of the future **$UR token airdrop**.
* **Traffic Kickback:** You earn a percentage of the points generated by your referrals when they move traffic.
* **Client Usage:** Referral points can also grant you additional "free" client usage on the VPN.
* **No Multiplier:** Referral points typically do not receive bonuses from country or Seeker multipliers.

### Finding Your Referral Code
* **Location:** Mobile App → Profile (Head Icon) → Settings → Referral Network.
* **Activation:** Referral codes may take time to appear after account creation, or may require your first successful payout to be generated.
* **Bug:** If your code is missing for an extended period, tag a moderator or developer in the `#support` channel.

### Referral Limits
* **Maximums:** Some accounts may hit a cap on the number of referrals they can add or receive benefits from. This is part of the network's anti-abuse system.

> **Staff Tip:** Refer people who have stable, high-speed networks. The more traffic they move, the more points you accumulate via the referral percentage. Self-referral (referring yourself) is detected as circular traffic and will not count toward rewards.
